message:
feat(fuzz): expand fuzz_exports with provider Processor re-exports
and add public wrappers for path normalization helpers

lib.rs fuzz_exports expansion:
- Re-export fuzz::Processor from all 7 providers (anthropic, azure,
  cohere, gemini, openai, openai_responses, vertex) as named aliases
  (AnthropicProcessor, AzureProcessor, etc.) under #[cfg(feature =
  "fuzzing")] for use by libfuzzer harnesses
- Re-export two new path normalization helpers from tools module:
  fuzz_normalize_dot_segments and fuzz_resolve_path

tools.rs fuzzing wrappers:
- Add `pub fn fuzz_normalize_dot_segments(path: &Path) -> PathBuf`
  gated behind #[cfg(feature = "fuzzing")] — exposes the internal
  normalize_dot_segments function for fuzz coverage of directory
  traversal defense logic
- Add `pub fn fuzz_resolve_path(file_path: &str, cwd: &Path) -> PathBuf`
  gated behind #[cfg(feature = "fuzzing")] — exposes the internal
  resolve_path function for fuzz coverage of relative/absolute path
  resolution and symlink-safe canonicalization

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
